name: @armoyu/core
description: Core business logic, models, and services for ARMOYU platforms.

scripts.test: npx tsx tests/auth-guards.test.ts && npx tsx --env-file=.env tests/user-enrichment.test.ts && npx tsx --env-file=.env tests/news-enrichment.test.ts && npx tsx --env-file=.env tests/search-enrichment.test.ts && npx tsx --env-file=.env tests/event-enrichment.test.ts
